headline: Truist Securities Maintains Hold on Zebra Technologies, Raises Price Target to $296
summary: Truist Securities  analyst Jamie Cook   maintains Zebra Technologies (NASDAQ:ZBRA) with a Hold and raises the price target from $267 to $296.
